method: A-tier deep-dive on top 8 B_forward candidates — checking BBB/SOS for actual current ownership

deep_dive_findings.owner_age: Catherine Awtrey (President/Owner, took over 2003 = 23 yrs personal tenure). D CEO 2019 + NTRCA Industry Leader 2020 widow-owner. Career changer (TV/real estate/image consulting). Likely 55-70 yo. License_tenure_proxy + owner_self_report.
deep_dive_findings.successor_verification: POSITIVE — Live team page (texasroof.com/company/our-team/) lists 7 senior leaders: Mike Cieri CFO, Danielle Begley VP Bus Ops, John Wayne Whitten Sr Advisor+QA/QC, Brett Norvell Director Ops, Ian Sellers Service Mgr, Dustin Daniel Chief Estimator, Ana Ledbetter Service Coord. NO Awtrey family members visible. No platform branding.
deep_dive_findings.comptroller_status: Unknown — Comptroller search blocked in this run. Required for Phase 6 follow-up.
deep_dive_findings.license_board_disciplinary: n/a — TX has no state roofing license.
deep_dive_findings.building_ownership: Not verified this run. Address: 728 Lingco Drive, Richardson TX 75081.
deep_dive_findings.value_add_thesis_sharpened: Catherine Awtrey is a career-changer widow-owner with 23 yrs personal tenure operating a commercial roofing maintenance shop in the Dallas-metro (Richardson). The business has a documented preventive-maintenance customer portfolio (firm-bid annual contracts) which is the highest-multiple part of commercial roofing M&A — Tecta America's bolt-on bids in TX commercial-flat space are 7-10x EBITDA. Specific levers: (1) AI dispatch + route optimization for the maintenance crew (likely on legacy spreadsheets), (2) digital inspection reports via Inspect Point / BuildingReports (likely paper-mailed today), (3) drone roof inspection adoption (industry standard 2024+), (4) RMR-style annual contract pricing standardization vs case-by-case bidding, (5) buyout setup for a non-Awtrey internal-promote (Brett Norvell, Director of Ops, is operational successor candidate — interview him directly). 18-24 mo EBITDA uplift 1.3-1.7x credible.
deep_dive_findings.metro_check: Richardson TX = Dallas exurban metro = hail-corridor +3 + DFW core 0 = +3 net L4 nudge applied.
deep_dive_findings.deep_dive_decision: PASSES — promote to A_acquire_self with confidence=medium-high. Item-1 owner age remains proxy (no OV65), so confidence not 'high'. Tier-A acceptance contingent on Comptroller status verification post-run.

deep_dive_findings.owner_age: Darlene Lee Omana (President since 1986 = 40 yrs personal tenure; joined Gill 1973 = 53 yrs at company). Likely 65-75 yo. Founded 1945 (81-yr business).
deep_dive_findings.successor_verification: AMBIGUOUS — Live About-Us fetch returned 404; team page not enumerable in this run. TX HR Resolution 761 (86R) honors company. No 'Lee' or 'Omana' family successor visible on website. Email darlene@gillroofingcoinc.com = President is point of contact (suggests no successor handling email).
deep_dive_findings.building_ownership: Not verified. Address: 5105 Up River Rd, Corpus Christi, TX 78407.
deep_dive_findings.value_add_thesis_sharpened: Darlene Lee Omana has been at Gill for 53 yrs (longer than most owners are alive). License #03-0172 (low number = old). EPA Lead Safe Certified. RCAT + GAF + OC Preferred + BBB. The 81-yr business has zero visible successor — classic profile. Coastal corridor (+2 L4) for hurricane-driven replacement + commercial maintenance volume. Specific levers: (1) modernization of the residential intake process (likely phone-only); (2) commercial maintenance portfolio expansion in Coastal Bend industrial corridor; (3) hire a successor general manager (Darlene has no obvious internal candidate); (4) preferred-customer hurricane-prep maintenance program leveraging Gill's brand recognition since 1945. Major uplift available via repositioning to commercial-maintenance-anchored from residential-heavy.
deep_dive_findings.deep_dive_decision: QUALIFIED PASS — promote to A_acquire_self pending live team-page fetch (currently 404'd) and Comptroller status. Cap at A_acquire_self with confidence=medium pending those verifications. If team-page fetch reveals same-surname successor → demote to B_forward.

deep_dive_findings.owner_age: Steven Polston (President/Director per BBB). NOT a Lankford. 1937 founding = 88-yr family business name now operated by non-family.
deep_dive_findings.successor_verification: Cannot be verified — Lankford-named successors absent from About Us page; Polston listed at BBB. Insufficient information to know whether Polston is recent buyer, in-law of Lankford family, or hired operator.
deep_dive_findings.deep_dive_decision: DEMOTE — Polston is the President but ownership transition history unverified. Likely already past the natural-exit window OR is the recent buyer (not natural exit). Could re-evaluate after CAD + SOS check. Cap at B_forward with confidence=low.

deep_dive_findings.owner_age: Aaron L. Sadler (Managing Member/Owner per BBB + LinkedIn + D&B). NOT 'T-Rock' family. 'Multi-generation family' is marketing language, not Sadler's family. Sadler likely 45-60 yo.
deep_dive_findings.successor_verification: Sadler is the operator-owner with no visible same-surname successor; long-tenured project managers (some 'Overby' family — Brandon + Dawson) but at PM level not ownership.
deep_dive_findings.deep_dive_decision: DEMOTE — Sadler is a non-family operator. Either recent buyer (not natural exit) OR married-in family continuator. Without verified date-of-acquisition, capping at B_forward with confidence=low.

deep_dive_findings.owner_age: Cannot determine — site About page 404'd. Founded 1956 (70 yrs), Permian Basin since 1988.
deep_dive_findings.successor_verification: Cannot verify on live fetch. Family-owned per claims.
deep_dive_findings.deep_dive_decision: DEFERRED — cap at B_forward pending live team-page fetch (Playwright needed).
